def verify_decoy() -> str:
    """Decrypt Function 2 to demonstrate the decoy."""
    enc2 = bytes([0x93, 0x76, 0xA4, 0xA5,
                  0x40, 0xF5, 0x1A, 0xE8,
                  0x91, 0x6C, 0x01])
